_comment: Example config for `anvil conformance <bundle> --live <this-file>` — the opt-in real lane. Copy it, point mcpUrl at your deployed Cloud Run /mcp endpoint, and run. The onus of correct config is on you (the operator).
_credentials: Header values may reference ${ENV_VAR}; they are resolved from the environment at connect time, so no secret is ever written into this file. Set PAYMENTS_TOKEN in the environment before running.
_safety: The live lane is production-safe: it lists tools (surface-live), proves the confirmation gate refuses without --confirm before any request is built (gate-live), and invokes ONLY the read operations you list in probeReads. It never drives a real mutation to completion.
